companies.name: ChatGPT - AI Chat Online
companies.shortDescription:
ChatGPT - AI Chat Online | Use Chat GPT online and for free. ChatGPT is a language model developed by OpenAI, designed to respond to text-based queries and generate natural language responses. | Chat GPT: AI Chat Online | ChatGPT is an AI-powered language model developed by OpenAI. It has been trained on a massive amount of text data from the internet and can generate human-like text responses to a given prompt. It can answer questions, converse on a variety of topics, and generate creative writing pieces. | Access the world's leading AI models вҖ” all in one place, completely free. | OpenAI's versatile AI for chat, code, and creative tasks | Anthropic's thoughtful AI with strong reasoning and analysis | Google's multimodal AI for complex reasoning and research | xAI's direct and witty assistant with real-time knowledge | Open-source AI excelling at coding and math reasoning | Alibaba's multilingual AI with strong coding capabilities | Moonshot's AI with ultra-long context for deep analysis | AI-powered answer engine with real-time web search | From the flagship GPT-5 to the lightweight Mini вҖ” choose the right OpenAI model for your task. | GPT-5 delivers PhD-level reasoning, real-time web research, and deep multimodal understanding. Great performance at high speed for everyday AI tasks. | A compact version of GPT-5 that delivers impressive intelligence at lightning speed. Great performance at high speed for everyday AI tasks. | ChatGPT-4o ("o" for "omni") is OpenAI's multimodal model that processes text, images, and audio natively within a single architecture. It delivers GPT-4-level intelligence at significantly faster speeds. | GPT-4o is designed for real-time interaction, making it ideal for conversations, quick analysis, and tasks that require understanding across multiple input types.
